## What changed

Describe the user-facing change and why it is useful.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests pass locally.
- [ ] Compose configuration validates.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated where needed.
- [ ] No profiles, reports, host paths, credentials, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Interface changes include current screenshots in both themes.

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for interface changes, or remove this section.
